canonical_definition: An active learning strategy that selects comparisons between the model’s most preferred and least preferred responses to explore extremes in the reward space.
papers: Active Reward Modeling: Adaptive Preference Labeling for Large Language Model Alignment
Position: AI Evaluation Should Learn from How We Test Humans
